sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after for DOWN action
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

# Check ASCII differences
before_ascii = before.ascii.split('\n')
after_ascii = after.ascii.split('\n')
print("ASCII diffs from DOWN:")
diff_count = 0
for i, (b, a) in enumerate(zip(before_ascii, after_ascii)):
    if b != a:
        diff_count += 1
        if diff_count <= 10:
            print(f"  Row {i}:")
            print(f"    Before: {b}")
            print(f"    After:  {a}")
print(f"  Total differing rows: {diff_count}")

# Check all node boundaries
print("\nAfter node boundaries:")
for n in after.segmentation['nodes']:
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
